text.title: AI-Assisted Persona Building Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required fields + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns listed at end.

example.note: id pattern fail; missing goals/pains/segment_rules/evidence; missing verified_by/interview_count.

forbidden.pattern: evidence array with fewer than 3 items
